description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are primarily white brick, complemented by large, black-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The house features a spacious wooden deck at the rear, bordered by neatly trimmed green hedges, and accessible through double glass doors. The interior is visible through the windows, revealing a contemporary open-plan living space with modern furnishings and decor. The main entryway is located at the back, opening onto the deck, and is accentuated by a pair of French doors. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with white brick walls, large black-framed windows, and a spacious wooden deck surrounded by hedges. The design is clean and open, with a flat roof and contemporary features.
description_view_0: This view highlights the interior layout, showing the open-plan living area and large windows on the side wall.
description_view_1: This angle showcases the rear of the house, the wooden deck, and the large windows facing the garden area.
description_view_2: The main entryway with double French doors and the surrounding deck and hedges are prominent in this view.
description_view_3: This perspective reveals the flat roof, the arrangement of rooms, and the connection between the deck and the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double French doors opening onto a wooden deck, bordered by hedges, with no steps or porch.
